leadText: Cotton Down (Japanese: わたげ Cotton Down) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Gossifleur and Eldegoss.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a damaging move, the Speed of all other Pokémon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokémon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Cotton Down has no effect outside of battle.
